ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item sold */,
  "dept_id" TEXT /* ID of the department where the item belongs */,
  "cat_id" TEXT /* ID of the category where the item belongs */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the state where the sale was made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "wm_yr_wk" INTEGER /* Week of the year when the sale was made */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week when the sale was made */,
  "wday" INTEGER /* Day of the week as a number (1-7) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year when the sale was made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the sale was made */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Number of items sold */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Price of each item sold */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (including tax and discounts) */,
  "event_name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_cat_id FOREIGN KEY ("cat_id") REFERENCES categories ("cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_event_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_name_id") REFERENCES event_names ("event_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "brand_id" TEXT /* ID of the brand of the item */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the item details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the department was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the department details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "cat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "cat_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the category details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the store was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the store details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the state was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the state details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., rolling mean, rolling median) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the trend was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the forecast details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user account details were last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the sale */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snapshots" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snapshot */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the snapshot */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date of the snapshot */,
  "snapshot_value" REAL /* Value of the snapshot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the snapshot was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the snapshot details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snapshots_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lag_values" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lag value */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the lag value */,
  "lag_date" TEXT /* Date of the lag value */,
  "lag_value" REAL /* Value of the lag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the lag value was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the lag value details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lag_values_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_names" (
  "event_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event name */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the event name was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the event name details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_name_id")
)
